commit_scope: Expand the Form-native oracle catalog with explicit third-party evidence lanes for code, tool, speech, media, data, package, source-grounding, model-judge, API, and CI learning loops.

commands: for x in clang swiftc ffmpeg ollama git rg npm node adb whisper-cli xmllint jq curl; do printf '%-12s ' "$x"; command -v "$x" || true; done
local_validation.notes: Host probe found clang, swiftc, ffmpeg, ollama, git, rg, npm, node, whisper-cli, xmllint, jq, and curl on PATH; adb was not on PATH. oracle-catalog returned verdict 16383 and validate.sh printed fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables). The proof covers teacher rows, installed and remote counts, unknown-lane refusal, fifteen evidence lanes, installed/remote evidence counts, compiler/package evidence grounding, source/CI remote membrane flags, and unknown evidence-kind refusal.

deploy_validation.summary: Local Form proof only. No public deploy was requested or performed in this step.

phase_gate.gate: Learning loops must name outside evidence providers explicitly before sampling them or treating them as authority.
phase_gate.next: Wire code-tool-learning, speech-model-learning, package/dependency lanes, and release gates to request evidence rows from this catalog and emit CHOICE-RECEIPT outcomes for champion/challenger retirement.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Cells and recipes now have a four-way-proven oracle evidence catalog for selecting external evidence lanes by learning kind without hiding remote membranes or installed-state claims.
test_flows: Installed local teacher rows remain queryable.
Unknown teacher lanes and unknown evidence kinds return absent rows.
Compiler and package-registry evidence lanes stay distinct.
Source-grounding and CI-provider lanes are remote membranes.
Installed and remote evidence counts are walked through the catalog.
e2e_validation.summary: This adds the menu of external evidence lanes. It does not yet execute each oracle; execution remains a separate explicit capability/request/receipt step per learning loop.
